summary: Comprehensive frontend-only UI testing of Scarface Restaurante Ávila landing page at https://scarface-cocina.preview.emergentagent.com/. All 15 required data-testid elements present; all hrefs correct (wa.me/34623513639, tel:+34623513639); hero scroll-scrub canvas renders and pixel values change on scroll (255,203,136 -> 69,56,1); 'Ver la carta' scrolls to #carta section; FAQ accordion expands; galeria has 8 images; mobile (390x844) shows sticky bar + toggle + drawer correctly while desktop nav is hidden; no horizontal overflow; zero runtime errors (only one benign Canvas2D willReadFrequently performance warning).

issues: Emergent platform 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the bottom-right 'WhatsApp' button of mobile-sticky-bar, partially hiding it. This is an Emergent platform injection, not application code — app team may need to raise z-index/position of its sticky bar slightly above the badge or leave right padding.

action_items: (Optional/Low) Pass { willReadFrequently: true } when calling canvas.getContext('2d') in components/ScrubSequence.jsx to silence the Chrome performance warning since the scrub reads frames frequently during scroll.
(Optional/Low) On mobile viewport, reserve space or adjust z-index/right offset for the 'WhatsApp' button in MobileStickyBar so the Emergent preview badge does not overlap it.
critical_code_review_comments: ScrubSequence canvas: add willReadFrequently:true to getContext('2d') to avoid the console warning and match usage pattern (frame-by-frame draw on scroll).
Hero CTA secondary uses href='#carta' — works, but consider smooth-scroll behaviour and scroll-margin-top on #carta so the fixed navbar does not cover the section heading.
Every section has data-testids, Pydantic-style testability is excellent. No code-quality blockers found.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this marketing site
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is stable and complete. All required testids: site-navbar, nav-cta-reserve, nav-mobile-toggle, mobile-menu, hero-section, hero-scrub-canvas, hero-headline, hero-cta-primary, hero-cta-secondary, carta-section, menu-dia-section, galeria-section, stats-section, testimonials-section, faq-section (faq-item-0..5), cta-footer-section, whatsapp-floating-button, mobile-sticky-bar are all present and functional. Canvas scrub verified by sampling pixel color before/after scroll — values differ confirming frames are being drawn. Scroll to #carta from secondary CTA lands at scrollY=2656. No horizontal overflow (bodyW=winW=1920). Only benign warning in console.

verified_elements.mobile_view: toggle+sticky bar visible, desktop nav hidden, drawer opens
